topics.title: American Idol Voting Strategy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the intense effort of voting for contestant Sanjaya, the lack of talent among other contestants, and a guest's appearance on The View.

topics.title: Reaction to Beth O on The View
topics.summary: The studio discusses the appearance of Beth O on The View, sharing fan feedback and personal reactions to her performance.

topics.title: Media Appearances and Career Prospects
topics.summary: The studio discusses Elizabeth Hasselbeck's appearance on The View, Rosie O'Donnell's past experiences with fans, and the employment possibilities for a caller named Jeff.

topics.title: Sal's Stage Fall and Recovery
topics.summary: The studio recounts the harrowing details of Sal falling off a stage during a performance, resulting in broken ribs and an arm, followed by his subsequent medical treatment and recovery.

topics.title: Sal's Stage Fall and Medical Treatment
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Sal's severe wrist injury from falling off a stage, his subsequent medical treatment by Dr. Shankman, and the history of prescription drugs.

topics.title: Pet Food Safety and Gambling Habits
topics.summary: The studio discusses the lack of regulation in the pet food industry leading to contamination, personal gambling habits as a substitute for weight loss goals, and an upcoming promotional event featuring a pornographic film record attempt.

topics.title: Adult Film Production and Skating Contest
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the logistics of an upcoming adult film production involving a large group scene, followed by a live skating competition where participants compete for prizes or roles in the movie.

topics.title: Erin Day Performance and Studio Weight Loss Contest
topics.summary: The studio features a performance by Erin Day on a vibrating machine followed by a discussion regarding the staff's weight loss competition and dietary choices.

topics.title: Celebrity Interviews and Musical Performances
topics.summary: The studio features a series of celebrity interviews with figures like Jason Alexander, Vince Vaughn, and Richard Dreyfus, followed by a live musical performance by the Fab Four.

topics.title: The Fab Faux Beatles Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a musical performance by the band The Fab Faux, who recreate complex Beatles arrangements using live instruments and no tapes.

topics.title: The Fab Faux Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a live musical performance by The Fab Faux, who perform several Beatles covers including "While My Guitar Gently Weeps" and discuss the technical challenges of recreating the band's complex harmonies.

topics.title: Beatles Music Analysis and American Idol Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores the musical contributions of the Beatles, discusses the impact of their influence on modern media like American Idol, and covers various segments including a segment on gambling habits and local news.

topics.title: Sexual Health and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding sexual health, the use of protection, and various observations about local and national media personalities.

topics.title: Social Dynamics of Divorce and Modern Relationships
topics.summary: The studio discusses the societal implications of rising divorce rates, attributing the shift to women's economic independence and a move away from unhappy marriages.

topics.title: Houdini Exhumation and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers the controversy surrounding the potential exhumation of Harry Houdini's remains, reports on a local celebrity's broken engagement, news regarding a White House official's health, and reactions to Sean Penn's criticisms of the Iraq War.

topics.title: Iraq Reconstruction and Military Policy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the lack of infrastructure in Iraq, the debate over troop withdrawal timelines among senators, and the controversy surrounding the military's handling of the Mark Fauly Tillman case.
